# taskmanager-sdk

Generated Dart SDK for **Task Manager API** v0.2.0.

## Installation

Add to your `pubspec.yaml`:

```yaml
dependencies:
  taskmanager-sdk:
    git:
      url: https://github.com/sterling-testing/taskmanager-dart.git
```

## Usage

```dart
import 'package:taskmanager-sdk/client.dart';

void main() async {
  final client = TaskmanagerSdkClient(
    apiKey: 'your-api-key',
  );

  try {
    // Use the client...
  } finally {
    client.close();
  }
}
```
